title: New book traces slavery, family and early capitalism through rural Louisiana
summary_en: ‘Sweet Home Feliciana’ by UChicago’s Rashauna Johnson moves between family memoir and global events to examine how Black history is shaped
title_cn: New book traces slavery, family and early capitalism through rural Louisiana

title: Paolo Cherchi, distinguished Romance philologist and devoted teacher, 1937-2026
summary_en: A scholar of extraordinary range, Cherchi guided generations of UChicago students with rigor, curiosity and care
title_cn: Paolo Cherchi, distinguished Romance philologist and devoted teacher, 1937-2026
